name: Karakuri Soldier mdl 236 "Nisamu"
name_jp: カラクリ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>兵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>へい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>弐</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ニ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>参</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>サ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>六</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ム</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: This card must attack if able. When this face-up Attack Position card is selected as an attack target, change it to Defense Position. When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard, you can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Karakuri" monster from your Deck in face-up Attack Position.
mnst_eff: This card must attack if able. When this face-up Attack Position card is selected as an attack target, change it to Defense Position. When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard, you can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Karakuri" monster from your Deck in face-up Attack Position.
